notableEvents.label: Jose Trevino reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Trevino reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Mark Vientos, assist to shortstop Zack Short.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Matt McLain.

notableEvents.label: Edwin Arroyo reached on error

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers pops out to third baseman Bo Bichette in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Juan Soto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Juan Soto grounds into a double play, second baseman Edwin Arroyo to shortstop Matt McLain to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Juan Soto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos grounds into a double play, pitcher Nick Lodolo to second baseman Edwin Arroyo to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. Marcus Semien out at 2nd. Mark Vientos out at 1st.
